3284420.name: OakRidge Research
3284420.description:
OakRidge Research is a first-person psychological horror game inspired by SCP lore, set in a small, inexperienced research facility. You take on the role of a junior night-shift researcher tasked with routine data analysis—but things quickly spiral into something far more disturbing.

Gameplay Features:

  • Task-Based Progression: Use an in-game computer to complete data entry and decoding tasks that slowly unravel the facility's dark secrets.

  • Psychological Horror Elements: Experience a creeping sense of dread through subtle environmental storytelling, distorted audio logs.

  • Uncover the Truth: Piece together logs, voice recordings, and environmental clues to understand what the research team was studying—and why it went wrong.

  • Disturbing Themes: The game contains depictions of suicide, blood, corpses, and intense psychological horror.

Game is meant to be played in one sitting taking around 20-25 minutes to complete
3284420.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
